meaning: n.(葡萄牙从前的秘密情报组织)国际及卫国警察
examples: You said the girls legs Pide too early?
The pupil could add and subtract but hadn't learned to pide.
Breads like lavash, naan, and pide are all different and wonderful varieties of Middle Eastern breads.
En una plaza, una novia le pide al novio que no "reprima" sus emociones.
Se pide un cese al fuego inmediato.
